title: Appeal accepted / allowed
keywords: appeal allowed; appeals allowed; allowed; appeal; appeals; accepted; allow the appeal
description: Used when the court accepts or allows the appeal.

title: Judgment set aside
keywords: set aside; aside; judgment set aside; high court set aside; judgment; indefensible; not justified
description: Used when a previous judgment is overturned or found legally unsustainable.

title: High Court decision not justified
keywords: high court not justified; not justified; indefensible; erroneous; unsustainable
description: Used when the higher court finds that the lower court's decision cannot stand.

title: Case remanded / reconsidered
keywords: remand; remanded; reconsideration; fresh consideration; sent back; restore
description: Used when the case is sent back for reconsideration or fresh decision.

title: Appeal dismissed / rejected
keywords: appeal dismissed; dismissed; rejected; reject; dismissal; no merit; without merit
description: Used when the appeal or petition is rejected by the court.

title: Petition not maintainable
keywords: not maintainable; maintainability; petition not maintainable; cannot be filed; no scope; writ petition
description: Used when the court rejects the case because the petition is not maintainable.

title: No interference with previous judgment
keywords: no interference; interfere; upheld; confirmed; no reason to interfere; concurrent findings
description: Used when the court refuses to interfere with the lower court's decision.

title: Costs order
keywords: costs; no orders as to costs; with costs; without costs; cost
description: Used when the judgment discusses legal costs.

title: Public interest litigation issue
keywords: public interest litigation; pil; service matters; contempt; locus standi
description: Used when the case discusses maintainability of public interest litigation or related procedural issues.
